spirit:component.spirit:name: design_1_gige_dual_speed_top_0_0

spirit:busInterface.spirit:name: phy_1g_rx_clk
spirit:busInterface.spirit:description: Recovered 125 MHz clock from the 1G RGMII PHY RX side. Drives the internal 1G MAC RX logic.

spirit:component.spirit:description: Gigabit Ethernet dual-speed (10/100/1000 Mbps) MAC wrapper with AXI interface
